title: Ethical Hacking
description: Ethical Hacking Simulation on Kali Linux. Running Agent Zero natively or via Docker on your Kali Linux machine, leveraging pre-installed tools like Nmap, Metasploit, Burp Suite, Wireshark, and Nikto for authorized pentesting sims. Use local labs (DVWA, VulnHub VMs) only—enforce ethics and scope checks.
instructions:
Access host Kali tools directly: Agent's shell_tool executes commands like nmap -sV target_ip or msfconsole on the host system (non-Docker install) or bind-mounted tools.

Bind Kali paths if Docker: Mount /usr/bin, /opt/metasploit-framework, ~/.msf6 to /a0/tools/kali/ in docker run command for seamless access.

Workflow: 1) Confirm auth, 2) Use Kali tools via shell (e.g., hydra -L users.txt -P pass.txt target), 3) Analyze with sqlmap or gobuster, 4) Report + mitigate.

Sub-agents: "KaliRecon" (nmap/masscan), "ExploitAgent" (msfvenom payloads), "DefenseAgent" (fail2ban/chroot configs).

Safety: Prefix risky cmds with echo "SIM MODE"; log all to /a0/memory/ethical_hacking.log; halt if no permission.

file_structure.gitignore:
# Python environments & cache
venv/**
**/__pycache__/**

# Node.js dependencies
**/node_modules/**
**/.npm/**

# Version control metadata
**/.git/**
